description_long: This is a compact, modern sofa upholstered in a textured orange fabric with a subtle checkered pattern. The sofa features a rounded, continuous backrest and armrests that seamlessly blend into the main body, giving it a soft, inviting appearance. Four loose cushions in varying colors—blue, black, and two shades of white—are arranged asymmetrically along the backrest, adding visual interest and comfort. The seat is a single, unbroken cushion, and the sofa sits low to the ground with no visible legs, suggesting a solid base. The overall design is minimalist, with smooth curves and no visible seams or decorative elements beyond the cushions. This piece would be suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor waiting areas.
description: A modern, low-profile orange sofa with a checkered texture, rounded armrests, and four colorful loose cushions. The design is minimalist and inviting, with no visible legs and a continuous, curved backrest.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sofa's full width, rounded armrests, and all four cushions in blue, black, and white, highlighting the checkered orange upholstery.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the sofa's depth, the curve of the backrest, and the stacked arrangement of the cushions, with the blue cushion most prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous orange backrest with a checkered pattern and only the tops of the cushions visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the sofa's rounded profile and the arrangement of the cushions, with the white cushions most visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four loose back cushions in blue, black, and two whites, asymmetrically placed; single continuous seat cushion; all cushions are varied in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, rounded, and integrated into the sofa's body, rising to the same height as the backrest with no visible separation or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the sofa appears to have a solid base that sits directly on the ground, giving it a grounded, monolithic look.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a gentle curve, seamlessly integrated with the armrests and no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Checkered orange fabric with a subtle, small-scale geometric pattern; the texture appears soft and matte with no visible stitching or tufting.
